docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00) SERVED OCT-05-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GRIFFITH, HOWARD

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-04-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PARTIES TO ATTEMPT TO SETTLE CLAIM THROUGH INSURANCE TO JAN-27-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JORDAN RICARDO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TREY GRIFFITH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TREY GRIFFITH ORALLY STATED IN COURT TREY GRIFFITH IS HIS NICKNAME AND HIS LEGAL NAME IS HOWARD GRIFFITH, DEFENDANT'S NAME UPDATED IN THE SYSTEM BY COURTROOM CLERK. DEFENDANT PROVIDED HIS INSURANCE INFORMATION TO PLAINTIFF IN COURT HANDED TO PLAINTIFF BY COURTROOM CLERK AND INSURANCE CARD IS RETURNED TO DEFENDANT IN COURT. PLAINTIFF MAY FILE A DISMISSAL BEFORE THE NEXT HEARING DATE OF JAN 27, 2023 IF MATTER HAS BEEN RESOLVED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-27-2023 - JUDGMENT.
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT GRIFFITH, HOWARD HEARING SET FOR MAR-01-2023 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF MAR-01-2023 IS DISMISSED - BY STIPULATION OF THE DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF JORDAN RICARDO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TREY GRIFFITH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT INFORMS IN COURT THAT HE AGREES TO PAY THE JUDGMENT AND HAS PAYMENT (CHECK) READY. DEFENDANT TREY GRIFFITH HANDED A CHECK TO PLAINTIFF JORDAN RICARDO IN COURT. DEFENDANT REQUESTS THE COURT TO DISMISS THE MOTION TO VACATE HEARING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. VISITING JUDGE: RONALD QUIDACHAY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY RICARDO, JORDAN AS TO DEFENDANT GRIFFITH, HOWARD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-04-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY RICARDO, JORDAN GRIFFITH, HOWARD
ORDER FOR PARTIES TO ATTEMPT TO SETTLE CLAIM THROUGH INSURANCE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-27-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-27-2023 BY JUDGE MURLENE J. RANDLE. PLAINTIFF JORDAN RICARDO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TREY GRIFFITH IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF STATES IN COURT THAT HIS CAR IS CURRENTLY BEING REPAIR BY INSURANCE, SEEKING $2000 REPAIR NOT COVERING BY INSURANCE AND $728 FOR TIME OF WORK. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MURLENE J. RANDLE; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RICARDO, JORDAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GRIFFITH, HOWARD $2,728.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,843.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER RE: MOTION TO VACATE IS DISMISSED PER REQUEST OF THE DEFENDANT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
